note: Naming-convention table for auto-mapping official #define macros to canonical fact keys. A manifest source with "auto_pins": true needs no per-pin mapping: the extractor scans every #define in the block, normalizes the macro name (strip these prefixes/suffixes), and maps it via this table. Macros not in the table are skipped, never guessed. The equivalence gate (verify-auto-mapping.js) proves this table reproduces the hand-authored mappings for T-Beam and T-Deck.
